positive: A majestic golden retriever puppy sitting happily in a field of oversized, stylized daisies. The puppy should be rendered with clean, thick outlines and a playful, joyful expression. Composition must be centered, with the puppy as the primary focal point. Use a vector-art aesthetic mixed with watercolor pop-art textures. High contrast, deep sapphire blue and vibrant yellow color palette against a soft, creamy background. Strong, flat silhouette potential. Minimalist, storybook illustration style. Perfect for apparel printing, high saturation, crisp lines, rule of thirds applied to the puppy's gaze.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, low detail, photorealism, oil painting, gradient, solid color background
